meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] 2024-04-22

- initial version of the aspect model for Certificate Signing Requests

nodes.label: CertificateSigningRequests
nodes.description: The certificate signing requests model contains the essential information needed to request specific certificates for a unique ECU component via a Certificate Signing Request (CSR) and to validate and certificate the ECU against this data.

nodes.label: certificateSigningRequestList
nodes.description: Describes one or more Certificate Singing Requests (CSR). Each set entry contains additional information (e.g. subjectCommonName, subjectLocality, etc.) in readable form, which is otherwise part of the encrypted CSR.

nodes.label: subjectCommonName
nodes.description: Describes the common name on where the certificate is requested.

nodes.label: subjectLocality
nodes.description:
Provides information about the specific type of the ECU that will be certified. 

The value for the subjectLocality is always the same for an ECU and its attached CSRs, but is required to additionally validate each individual CSR.

nodes.label: certificateSigningRequest
nodes.description:
A CSR (Certificate Signing Request) is a 64-based PEM formatted and encrypted message to request and receive a digital certificate. The CSR validates the information required by a specific certification authority (CA) to issue the associated digital certificate.

The CSR consists of encrypted data, which can include, for example, basic information about the ECU and its manufacturer (common name, company, organizational unit, country, city/town, etc.), information about the public key attached to the certificate, as well as information on the key type and length.

nodes.label: subjectSerialNumber
nodes.description:
The serial number of the assembly part generated by the manufacturer that is used to identify the ECU component in a unique way. The subject serial number is identical to the serial number (partInstanceId) specified in the aspect model SerialPart.

The value for the subjectSerialNumber is always the same for an ECU and its attached CSRs, but is required to additionally validate each individual CSR.

nodes.label: CertificateSigningRequestsCharacteristic
nodes.description: A data set that can contain several Certificate Signing Requests (CSR). If CSRs exist, all subject information must be provided.

nodes.label: CertificateSigningRequestsEntity
nodes.description: The Entity of a certificate signing requests to additionally structure the set.

nodes.label: SubjectCommonNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the subject common characteristic, that is defined as a String.

nodes.label: SubjectLocalityCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the subject locality, that is defined as a String.

nodes.label: CertificateSigningRequestCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the certificate signing request ID, that is defined as a String.

nodes.label: SubjectSerialNumberCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the subject serial number, that is defined as a String.
